source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A ray of light is incident on a spherical mirror parallel to its principal axis.
Which of the following diagrams shows the reflected ray correctly?
Note: The smooth side is the reflecting part of the mirror, and the dotted side is the back.
<image_1>
extraction_notes: 答案字段为选项字母 A，按选项映射提取为 <image_2>。
记录中仅出现 <image_1> 至 <image_5> 占位符和 PIL.Image 对象描述，未提供实际图片路径或 URL。

issues: answer_text is stored as the placeholder '<image_2>' rather than an explicit textual option label.
metadata.image_paths is empty while the top-level image_paths field contains one image path.
question_text and answer_text reference placeholders (<image_1>, <image_2>), but no explicit placeholder-to-file mapping is provided.

image_dependency: question asks which diagram shows the reflected ray correctly, so the visual options are essential
the task depends on spatial/visual features of mirror orientation, reflecting side vs back, and ray direction
multi_step: requires combining physics knowledge about spherical-mirror reflection with interpretation of the diagram
the note about smooth side being reflective adds an extra condition beyond simply recalling the principal-axis rule
multiple-choice format with 4 diagram options implies comparison across alternatives, but the reasoning depth still appears moderate rather than highly compositional
verifiability: answer is effectively a single-choice selection among four options, which is in principle easy to verify
verifiability is reduced because answer_text is stored as the image placeholder '<image_2>' rather than an explicit option label
question and answer reference image placeholders without explicit placeholder-to-file mapping, creating ambiguity for automated checking
